<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th style="width: 33%;">Deprecated</th>
<th style="width: 33%;">Unify</th>
<th style="width: 33%;">Migration Notes</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>--made-checkbox-color-background-branded-selected</td>
<td>--made-color-brand-primary</td>
<td>Deprecated: In B2B 3.0 CSS, this token was only used in the Checkbox component. It has since been replaced with non-component-level tokens.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>--made-checkbox-color-background-neutral-selected</td>
<td>--made-color-background-feedback-neutral-strong-default</td>

</tr>

<td>--made-shadow-toggle</td>
<td>--made-component-toggle-thumb-box-shadow</td>
<td></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>--made-shadow-default</td>
<td>--made-box-shadow-default</td>
<td>Deprecated. We have the updated the name of this tokens to -box-shadow-[...] to match the CSS property name. We have also added additional tokens for box-shadow in Unify.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>--made-table-color-border-resize</td>
<td>--made-color-icon-helper</td>
<td>Deprecated. The table component has been deprecated in Unify. Please update token to new Unify token.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>--made-border-radius-circle</td>
<td>--made-border-radius-full</td>
<td>Deprecated. This tokens has been renamed. For icon only button specs use the component level token: `made-component-button-default-border-radius token`</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>--made-color-action-background-disabled</td>
<td>--made-color-background-disabled</td>
<td>Deprecated. Unify uses a single disabled background token across disabled states.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>--made-color-action-background-highlight</td>
<td>--made-component-date-picker-day-background-in-range</td>
<td>Deprecated: This B2B token is only used in the datepicker component - please replace with new Unify token.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>--made-color-action-background-hover</td>
<td>--made-color-background-surface-hover</td>
<td>Deprecated: Please update token to Unify token --made-color-background-surface-hover, a token for background color for hover states of UI Elements</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>--made-color-action-background-off</td>
<td>--made-color-background-disabled</td>
<td>Teams will potentially need component level tokens or some adjustment if its only for Toggle’s and if it needs to be different to the background disabled color.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>--made-color-action-background-on</td>
<td>--made-color-background-feedback-success-strong-default</td>
<td>Deprecated. This token is only used for the toggle component that are switched on only. Please update this tken to Unify token made-color-background-feedback-success-strong-default</td>
</tr>

<td>Deprecated: In Made CSS 3.0 this is only being used in the context of a primary button. In Unify this has been replaced with component level tokens for buttons.</td>
